items.title: Steelbird Launches SB-120 Helmet Starting at Rs 3,999
items.summary: Steelbird Helmets has introduced the new SB-120 motorcycle helmet in the Indian market. The new model is priced at Rs 3,999 for the mono color variants and Rs 4,499 for models featuring decals.

items.title: Tata Curvv EV SeriesX Launch Price Starts Rs 16.99 Lakh – 55 kWh, 502 km Range
items.summary: Tata Curvv EV SeriesX launch price is Rs 16.99 lakh (Ex-sh), consisting of Accomplished X and Empowered X trims with 55 kWh battery pack The post Tata Curvv EV SeriesX Launch Price Starts Rs 16.99 Lakh – 55 kWh, 502 km Range appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: Nissan Gravite CNG Kit Launch Price Rs 83K – Twin Cylinder + 7 Seats
items.summary: Nissan Gravite CNG kit launch price is Rs 83k, offering you the versatility of twin cylinder CNG tanks along with 7-seater capability The post Nissan Gravite CNG Kit Launch Price Rs 83K – Twin Cylinder + 7 Seats appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: Nissan rolls out CNG retrofit for GRAVITE at ₹82,999
items.summary: The CNG kit has been developed and supplied by Motozen, and includes a third-party warranty of three years or 1,00,000 km on components

items.title: Honda Cars Discounts May 2026 Up To Rs 2.12 Lakh – City, Amaze, Elevate
items.summary: Honda Cars discounts for the month of May 2026 can go till Rs 2.12 lakh and City sedan gets highest cash benefits ahead of facelift launch The post Honda Cars Discounts May 2026 Up To Rs 2.12 Lakh – City, Amaze, Elevate appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: BMW M440i Convertible Launch Price Rs 1.09 Cr – 374 bhp, 250 Km/h, 4.9s 0-100
items.summary: BMW M440i Convertible has been launched in India at Rs 1.09 Cr (Ex-sh), undercutting its rival, Mercedes CLE Cabriolet The post BMW M440i Convertible Launch Price Rs 1.09 Cr – 374 bhp, 250 Km/h, 4.9s 0-100 appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: 2027 Hyundai Creta Renders In New Colours – Based On Latest Spy Shots
items.summary: Creta has consistently remained among the top-selling SUVs in the country. Now, Hyundai has started working on the next-generation Creta The post 2027 Hyundai Creta Renders In New Colours – Based On Latest Spy Shots appeared first on RushLane .

items.title: Renault India April sales more than doubles to 5,413 units on Triber, Kiger boost
items.summary: The recently launched Renault Duster has also contributed to demand, with deliveries beginning in the latter part of April.

items.title: Nissan India sales jump 75% to 3,203 units in April
items.summary: Total sales, including exports, stood at 5,388 units, supported by demand for the All-New Nissan Gravite and continued traction for the Magnite.

items.title: Hyundai India posts highest-ever April domestic sales at 51,902 units, up 17%
items.summary: Exports stood at 13,708 units, while the all-new Venue recorded its highest-ever monthly domestic sales of 12,420 units.

items.title: Atul Auto, Exponent Energy partner to roll out 15-minute charging electric three-wheelers
items.summary: The tie-up will integrate 15-minute rapid charging technology into factory-built vehicles, aiming to accelerate EV adoption in the commercial segment.
